title: HEALTH AND WELLNESS PROGRAMS - 211info
text: MCMINNVILLE OFFICE HEALTH AND WELLNESS PROGRAMS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides eligibility determination for Medicaid and SNAP, licensing of adult foster care homes, private and pre-admission nursing home assessments, Senior Peer Mentoring, and health and wellness programs. 300 SW Hill Road S McMinnville, OR 97128 Eligibility: Age 60 and older and people with physical disabilities age 18 and over Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (503) 472-9441 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 472-9441 Toll-free (866) 333-7218 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation and signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Yamhill County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Coming south into McMinnville on Highway 99, turn right (west) onto Second Street by the McMinnville Public Library. Go four miles. A business complex will be on the left. Turn left at the first entrance into the complex and go between two buildings and over a speed bump. It will be the next building on the left, a one-story beige building. Services: Food Stamps/SNAP * Adults With Disabilities/Health Conditions Food Stamps/SNAP * Older Adults Foster Home Placement Medicaid * Adults With Disabilities/Health Conditions Medicaid * Older Adults Mentoring Programs * Older Adults Nursing Facility Referrals Wellness Programs * Adults With Disabilities/Health Conditions Wellness Programs * Older Adults Other Services Offered At This Location: FOOD - HOME DELIVERED MEALS HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - AGING AND DISABILITY RESOURCE CONNECTION INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - OPTIONS COUNSELING INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - OREGON PROJECT INDEPENDENCE – MEDICAID INFORMATION SERVICES - FAMILY CAREGIVER SUPPORT PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. MCMINNVILLE OFFICE
